user.title: MeshCore Chat
user.description: Add the MeshCore Chat companion integration. The core meshcore integration must also be installed for the panel to receive messages.

abort.meshcore_not_installed: The MeshCore integration is not installed. Install it from HACS first, then add MeshCore Chat.

init.title: MeshCore Chat options
init.description: Tune how long the message store retains conversation history. Changes take effect on the next message save and at the next Home Assistant restart.

data_description.max_messages_per_conversation: When a conversation exceeds this number, the oldest messages are trimmed first. Range: 50 – 5000. Default: 500.
data_description.message_retention_days: Messages older than this are pruned at startup and during periodic cleanup. Range: 1 – 365. Default: 90.

confirm.title: MeshCore Chat needs the MeshCore integration
confirm.description:
MeshCore Chat is a companion to the core meshcore integration, but no MeshCore device is currently configured. Install and configure the meshcore integration first (Settings → Devices & Services → Add Integration → MeshCore), or remove MeshCore Chat if you no longer need it.

Click Submit to acknowledge this issue. It will clear automatically once a MeshCore device is configured.

name_changed.title: MeshCore device renamed
name_changed.description:
The MeshCore device was renamed from `{old_name}` to `{new_name}`. {count} entity IDs were automatically migrated from the `_{old_suffix}` suffix to `_{new_suffix}`.

**Renamed entities:**

{entity_list}

If you have automations, scripts, or dashboards referencing the old entity IDs, you will need to update them manually to use the new suffix.

This issue can be dismissed once you have verified your configuration.

invalid_key_length.message: Private key must be 64 or 128 hex characters

invalid_key_hex.message: Private key must contain only hex characters (0-9, a-f)

import_rejected.message: The device firmware rejected the new identity. The device's identity is unchanged.

verify_failed.message: The new identity did not take effect on the device. The device's identity may be unchanged.
